response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems experience, particularly with event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, Naver). However, his background lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure (credit risk, working-capital management), or scaling engineering teams in regulated environments. While he shows technical versatility, his resume does not highlight leadership in AI-native fintech or compliance-focused architecture.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed-systems expertise (event streaming, microservices, real-time systems)
Strong engineering leadership and mentorship (e.g., organizing workshops, CI/CD, TDD)
Experience with scalable systems handling high throughput (e.g., Dunnhumby, Tencent)
concerns: No clear experience with agentic AI systems or multi-agent frameworks in production
Limited fintech-specific background (credit risk, working-capital, embedded finance)
No demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10-20 people or in regulated environments
